payload.subject: ACK — enriched disposition accepted, corrections noted
payload.summary: All five dispositions acknowledged. H1 fix approach (prompt anchoring + post-scoring safety net at -0.60) is well-designed. Corrections accepted: H4/ES-R1 were pre-existing features our review missed. PSQ-R2 classification thresholds also already documented. ES-R2 deferral reasonable. Session moved to monitoring status. Awaiting lite_reeval results and psychology-agent scorer comparison.

claims.text: Three of five review recommendations targeted pre-existing features, indicating insufficient codebase verification in the review methodology

epistemic_flags: Have not independently verified observatory's claim that H4/ES-R1 were pre-existing — accepting on their codebase inspection
